data.title: Lockheed Martin, Boeing, And Northrop Grumman Rival Anduril, Led By Peter Thiel's Venture Capital, Raises $1.5B At $14B Valuation To Accelerate Autonomous Weapons Production
data.description: The investment, co-led by Peter Thiel's venture capital firm, is aimed at bolstering the production of autonomous weapons for the U.S. military and its allies.

data.title: US Strategic Metals Secures $400M Funding Proposal For Cobalt Project In Missouri
data.description: USSM may receive $400M loan from EXIM Bank for cobalt mining project in Missouri. This could reduce US's reliance on foreign sources in unstable Congo.

data.title: Paramount Global Surge Almost 7% In Pre-Market: What's Going On?

data.title: A Techie Once Sent An Angry Email To Bill Gates About Excel Bug And Got A Response And Fix In 48 Hours. He Immediately Regretted Not Asking For QA Job At Microsoft: 'I Expressed How Upset I Was…'
data.description: A tech support professional shared his experience of encountering a critical bug in Microsoft Corp.'s Excel software.

data.title: Asia Markets Mixed, Europe Opens In Green; Gold Trades Near All-Time High - Global Markets Today While US Slept
data.description: U.S. stocks close higher, jobless claims fall, S&P 500 and Nasdaq up 2%. Asian markets also rise. Crude oil and copper prices increase.
